title: cornopteris opaca
intro: Cornopteris opaca, a type of fern plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cornopteris opaca include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
